title: Automated Digital Product Delivery with Crypto Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine being a digital creator in Kenya, sitting on a mountain of valuable knowledge and skills, but unable to monetize them due to the restrictions imposed by payment processing platforms like PayPal and Stripe. You've spent years honing your craft, creating ebooks, courses, and templates that people desperately need, but every time you try to sell them, you're met with a brick wall of 'KYC' and 'banking limitations.' The frustration is palpable, and the financial losses are mounting. Something needs to change – and fast. In this post, we'll explore a game-changing solution that will finally allow you to get paid for your digital creations, without relying on traditional payment processors.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated digital product delivery with crypto is a solution that solves the payment processing conundrum faced by digital creators in restricted countries like Kenya. It's a technology that enables you to sell your digital products – ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, presets, and more – directly to customers, without the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. By using blockchain-based payment processing, you can receive payments in cryptocurrency, which can then be converted to fiat currency at the point of sale. This means that you can get paid instantly, without worrying about banking limitations or KYC requirements. The implications are profound: you can finally monetize your digital creations, reach a global audience, and build a sustainable business.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At its core, automated digital product delivery with crypto relies on a combination of blockchain-based payment processing and smart contracts. When a customer buys a digital product, the payment is processed through a platform like NOWPayments, which converts the cryptocurrency into fiat currency in real-time. The smart contract then triggers the automated delivery of the digital product, which can be anything from an ebook to a software plugin. The entire process is seamless, secure, and transparent, ensuring that both the buyer and the seller have a smooth experience. By leveraging these technologies, you can create a seamless sales funnel that converts customers into buyers, without any hassle or delay.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Automated digital product delivery with crypto is designed specifically for digital creators like you, who face payment processing restrictions in countries like Kenya. Whether you're an ebook author, a course creator, or a software developer, this technology empowers you to reach a global audience and monetize your digital creations. By providing a frictionless payment experience, you can focus on what you do best – creating high-quality digital products that solve real-world problems. With this technology, you can say goodbye to payment processing headaches and hello to a sustainable business model that generates consistent revenue.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

To make automated digital product delivery with crypto work, you'll need a few key components. First, you'll need a platform like NOWPayments that enables blockchain-based payment processing. Next, you'll need a digital product distribution platform like Core Shop Engine, which automates the delivery of digital products. Finally, you'll need a smart contract that triggers the delivery of the digital product when payment is received. By integrating these components, you can create a seamless sales funnel that converts customers into buyers, without any hassle or delay.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the technology behind automated digital product delivery with crypto, it's time to take action. Start by selecting a digital product distribution platform like Core Shop Engine, which provides everything you need to automate delivery and processing payments. Next, set up a blockchain-based payment processing platform like NOWPayments, which enables you to accept cryptocurrency payments. Finally, create a smart contract that triggers the delivery of your digital product when payment is received. By following these steps, you can start selling your digital creations to a global audience, without worrying about payment processing headaches.

The most common question I get is: 'What about security? Is this technology safe?' The answer is a resounding yes. Automated digital product delivery with crypto uses blockchain-based payment processing, which ensures that transactions are secure, transparent, and tamper-proof. Additionally, the smart contracts used in this technology ensure that digital products are delivered only when payment is received, eliminating the risk of piracy or unauthorized access.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.

Automated digital product delivery with crypto is just one part of a larger ecosystem that's transforming the way we buy and sell digital products. To get started with automated digital product delivery with crypto, follow these concrete action steps: Select a digital product distribution platform like Core Shop Engine, which provides everything you need to automate delivery and processing payments. Set up a blockchain-based payment processing platform like NOWPayments, which enables you to accept cryptocurrency payments. Once you've completed these steps, you're ready to start selling your digital creations to a global audience.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
